chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5479 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.2890/2025 2. For order on CMA No.2894/2025 3. For order on CMA No.28584/2024 4. For order on office objection 5. For order on CMA No.24165/2024 6. For hearing of main case 18.02.2025 Mr. Ismail Shah, advocate for the petitioner Present petition seeks to restrain auction of a commercial shop. No particulars of the process under which the auction process is taken place has been impugned in this petition. Even otherwise assertion of title in respect of immoveable property is not amenable to writ jurisdiction in writ petition. Learned counsel also states that earlier petition of the same petitioner with respect to the subject matter has also been dismissed. In view hereof no case is made out to entertain this petition, therefore, while granting the urgent application this petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
